seoDescription: Meet the team behind Ethereal, learn our story, and discover the values that guide everything we build.

hero.title: We're on a mission to CRAFT
hero.subtitle: Ethereal was born from a simple frustration: too many tools, too little flow. We set out to build one platform that unifies the entire creative and engineering workflow — and we're just getting started.

story.title: Built by builders, for builders.
story.body1: In 2021, Elena and Jordan were engineering leads at a fast-growing startup. They watched their teams waste hours every week jumping between disconnected tools — losing context, duplicating work, and shipping slower as a result.
story.body2: They left to build something better: a single, cohesive workspace where design, engineering, and product could collaborate in real time without the overhead. Two years later, over 50,000 teams around the world agree they were onto something.

values.title: What guides every decision we make
values.subtitle: These aren't posters on a wall. They're the principles we use to decide what to build, who to hire, and how to treat our customers.

items.title: Start with why
items.description: Every decision we make begins with understanding the purpose behind it. We build tools that genuinely solve real problems.

items.title: Clarity over complexity
items.description: Simple, well-crafted solutions beat clever complexity every time. We obsess over reducing friction for our users.

items.title: Open by default
items.description: We believe in transparency — with our customers, our team, and in the tools we build. No hidden agendas.

items.title: Move with intention
items.description: We move fast, but never recklessly. Every feature ships when it's ready — not a moment sooner.

timeline.title: How we got here
timeline.subtitle: Five years of building, learning, and growing — one milestone at a time.

milestones.detail: Elena and Jordan quit their jobs to build the tools they always wished existed.
Raised $4M to grow the team and launch a private beta with 200 design partners.
Opened to the world. 10,000 teams signed up in the first month.
Raised $22M. Expanded to Europe and APAC. Hit 25,000 paying teams.
Launched AI-powered workflows. Named a Top 10 Product of the Year by Product Hunt.
50,000+ teams worldwide. Still day one in our minds.

team.title: The humans behind Ethereal
team.subtitle: A small, exceptional team with a big ambition. We hire for craft, curiosity, and kindness — in equal measure.

members.name: Elena Vasquez
members.bio: Previously led product at two unicorn startups. Passionate about tools that empower creators.

members.name: Jordan Kim
members.bio: Ex-Google engineer. Built distributed systems for 10+ years before starting Ethereal.

members.name: Priya Sharma
members.bio: Award-winning product designer with a love for systems thinking and accessible interfaces.

members.name: Tomás Herrera
members.bio: Open-source contributor and conference speaker. Believes great DX is the foundation of great products.

members.name: Mei Lin
members.bio: Data-driven marketer who helped scale two B2B SaaS products from 0 to Series B.

members.name: Finn Larsen
members.bio: Customer champion who turned support into one of Ethereal's strongest growth levers.

join.title: Want to help build Ethereal?
join.subtitle: We're a remote-first team that values autonomy, craft, and genuine curiosity. Check out our open roles.
